zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Brydges於1389年出生在英國賀福爾洛--也時，她的父親Sir John De Brugge21歲，母親Joan Pyne25歲。她於1407年與Sir John Baskerville在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Brydges于1389年出生在英国賀福爾洛--也时，她的父亲Sir John De Brugge21岁，母亲Joan Pyne25岁。她于1407年与Sir John Baskerville在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Brydges was born in 1389, in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir John De Brugge, was 21 and her mother, Joan Pyne, was 25. She married Sir John Baskerville in 1407, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1430, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Brydges est née en 1389, à Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John De Brugge, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Pyne, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Baskerville en 1407, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Brydges 1389 in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Brugge 21 und ihre Mutter Joan Pyne 25. Sie hat 1407 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Baskerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Brydges è nata il nel 1389 nel Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John De Brugge, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joan Pyne, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Baskerville nel 1407, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1430, nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Brydgesが1389年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアロス-オン-ウイで生まれた時，父Sir John De Bruggeは21歳，母Joan Pyneは25歳であった。1407年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでSir John Baskervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Brydges(이)가 1389년 영국 허퍼드실르 로스--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Brugge(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Pyne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Sir John Baskerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Brydges nasceu em 1389, em Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John De Brugge, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pyne, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Baskerville em 1407, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Brydges родилась в 1389 г. в местности росс-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John De Brugge было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Pyne, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Baskerville в 1407 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Brydges nació en 1389, en Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John De Brugge, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan Pyne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir John Baskerville en 1407, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1430, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
